channel.title: Network Security on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB
channel.description: Recent content in Network Security on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB

item.title: Centralized Network Security via Router-Level Filtering
item.description: Objective: To implement non-device-specific security controls by enforcing domain blocking at the network gateway.

item.title: Network Security Fundamentals and Threat Assessment
item.description: Objective: To conduct a comprehensive study of network threat vectors and security controls to establish a foundational defense strategy for organizational environments.
